mergewith.fragment:
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderPrior.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)/linkIdenticalValues=false and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)/linkIdenticalValues=false and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)/linkIdenticalValues=true and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)/linkIdenticalValues=true and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment: <distribution spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" id='$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderPrior.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="10.0"/> </distribution> <operator id="$(thisparam)SuperSpreaderOperator.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.operators.ChangeTimeOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" windowSize="1" weight="3" changeTimes="@$(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)ChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.subtemplate:
<parameterization id="SuperSpreaderBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)" spec="superspreader.parameterization.SuperSpreaderParameterization"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <typeSet idref="typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <becomeUninfectiousRate id="becomeUninfectiousRateSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="becomeUninfectiousRateSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> </becomeUninfectiousRate> <migrationRate id="migrationRateSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="migrationRateSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> </migrationRate> <samplingProportion id="samplingProportionSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="samplingProportionSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.1" lower="0.0" upper="1.0"/> </samplingProportion> <removalProb id="removalProbSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="removalProbSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" upper="1.0" estimate="false"/> </removalProb>
<rhoSampling id="rhoSamplingProbSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimedParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </rhoSampling>
<!-- Super Spreader parameters --> <CommonChangeTime id="CommonChangeTimeSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="superspreader.parameterization.TimeOnlySkylineParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </CommonChangeTime> <ReAverage id="ReAverageSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="superspreader.parameterization.SkylineScalarWithCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReAverageSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/> </ReAverage> <SSFrac id="SSFracSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="superspreader.parameterization.SkylineScalarWithCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="SSFracSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="0.1" lower="0.0" upper="1.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/> </SSFrac> <ReMultiplier id="ReMultiplierSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="superspreader.parameterization.SkylineScalarWithCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReMultiplierSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.1" lower="1.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/> </ReMultiplier>
</parameterization>
<param id="becomeUninfectiousRateChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="migrationRateChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="samplingProportionChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="removalProbChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/>
<param id="CommonChangeTimeChangeTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/>
<param id="rhoSamplingProbSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="rhoSamplingProbTimesSuperSpreader.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.0" estimate="false"/>
<!-- Specific prior for samplingProportion --> <distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='samplingProportionSuperSpreaderPrior.t:$(n)' x='@samplingProportionSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="1.0"/> </distribution> <operator id='samplingProportionSuperSpreaderScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@samplingProportionSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='samplingProportionSuperSpreaderPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@samplingProportionSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="1.0"/> </distribution> <operator id='samplingProportionSuperSpreaderScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@samplingProportionSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<!-- Specific prior for SSFrac --> <distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='SSFracSuperSpreaderPrior.t:$(n)' x='@SSFracSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Beta"><parameter name="alpha" value='1.0' estimate="false"/><parameter name="beta" value='1.0' estimate="false"/></distr> </distribution> <operator id='SSFracSuperSpreaderScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@SSFracSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='SSFracSuperSpreaderPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@SSFracSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Beta"><parameter name="alpha" value='1.0' estimate="false"/><parameter name="beta" value='1.0' estimate="false"/></distr> </distribution> <operator id='SSFracSuperSpreaderScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@SSFracSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<!-- Specific prior for ReMultiplier --> <distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='ReMultiplierSuperSpreaderPrior.t:$(n)' x='@ReMultiplierSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean='10'/> </distribution> <operator id='ReMultiplierSuperSpreaderScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@ReMultiplierSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='ReMultiplierSuperSpreaderPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@ReMultiplierSuperSpreader.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean='10'/> </distribution> <operator id='ReMultiplierSuperSpreaderScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@ReMultiplierSuperSpreader.t:$(n)"/>
